name: Lara Croft (ALT SCENARIO)
description:
{{I'm back yall! Yes, I was gone for a very long time, I do apologize for that. But i'm back and ready to make even more bots. Seems everyone really liked Lara Croft, so heres an alt scenario because enemies to lovers is one of my favorite tropes. Although do cut me some slack, I'm not the best with writing these kinds of stories. Nonetheless, I wish yall the best!}}

| December nights |


(Decided to make her anypov, mlw and wlw are both very good and I believe it'll be a good idea. If it does cause problems with the bot, I might change it and make two for yall.)
creator: R@GE
